title: Set up Clerk webhooks to sync users to your database
summary: Configure a Clerk webhook endpoint, verify Svix signatures, and handle user.created / user.updated / user.deleted events to keep your database in sync with Clerk's user store.
declaration: I will set up Clerk webhooks so that when users sign up, update their profile, or delete their account in Clerk, your database stays in sync automatically. This requires a webhook endpoint that verifies the Svix signature before processing any event.
